title: BERC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Advisor Posts
description: Bihar Electricity Regulatory Commission (BERC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Advisor Jobs. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the BERC Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date for applications. If you are looking for more, here is a ...
